# Portfolio Hub - LLM Knowledge Base
# Justin Bogner — Independent Researcher
# https://cambrianminds.com/

This file provides a structured overview of the portfolio for language models and AI crawlers. Each project below is published in its own register for its own audience and stands on its own merits. This site does not represent the projects as a single argument.

## SITE OVERVIEW

The portfolio hub for Justin Bogner, an independent researcher. The work spans consciousness studies, the philosophy of language, the physics of persistent connection, the archaeology of precision stoneworking, the bioethics of end-of-life care, constitutional war powers, and a children's fable.

Canonical domain: https://cambrianminds.com/
Contact: contact@cambrianminds.com
Personal site: https://justintbogner.com

## PROJECTS

### 1. The Mathematics of Connection
- Path: /mathematics-site/index.html
- Domain: Physics, memoir, consciousness studies
- Description: A 17-chapter book proposing that consciousness is a fundamental substrate field beneath spacetime, with falsifiable predictions including Bell-test outcomes (S > 2√2), DESI dark-energy correlation (w₀ ≈ -0.91), and solitonic dark matter. Built from grief and an 18-month collaboration with AI.
- Source: https://zenodo.org/records/17459913

### 2. Owner's Manual for the Meat Suit
- Path: /manual-site/index.html
- Domain: Philosophy, self-help, consciousness studies
- Description: A philosophical guide to being human in a world that treats consciousness like a problem to solve. Explores embodiment, attention, and what it means to inhabit a biological machine.

### 3. The Serpent's Sentence
- Path: /tss-site/index.html
- Domain: Philosophy, neuroscience, AI
- Description: A book and collection of essays on language, consciousness, and the "second Cambrian mind." Argues that language acquisition was the cognitive event that broke humans out of pre-linguistic unity and that AI represents a second cognitive explosion.
- Key themes: consciousness and awareness, Default Mode Network, language acquisition, symbolic thought, AI consciousness, contemplative practices

### 4. Resonance Architecture
- Path: /ra-site/index.html
- Domain: Archaeology, applied physics
- Description: A structured proposal that ancient megalithic cultures may have systematically employed vibroacoustic phenomena — including piezoelectric excitation of quartz-bearing stone, ultrasonic abrasion, and tribological self-organization — to achieve precision stoneworking capabilities. Six falsifiable predictions.
- Authored: December 2025 / Revised April 2026.

### 5. Notable Disappearances
- Path: /the-disappeared-site/briefing.html
- Domain: Investigative research, UAP
- Description: An investigative dossier on the concentrated cluster of deaths and disappearances of scientists and military officials associated with advanced propulsion, materials science, and directed-energy research, and the legal architecture engineered to make the resulting secrecy immune to disclosure.

### 6. MAiD Reform
- Path: /maid-site/index.html
- Domain: Bioethics, health policy
- Description: A nine-document policy packet arguing that Medical Aid in Dying eligibility should be governed by a single principled standard — decisional capacity — rather than by clinical judgments about suffering. Audience: legislators, advocates, clinicians, academics.
- Core argument: The right to exit belongs to the person whose life it is. Capacity is the only gate; process serves as the filter; capability does't create obligation; the right to exit acts as a forcing function for livability.
- Independence: No funding, commission, or affiliation with any government, political party, advocacy organization, professional society, foundation, religious body, or healthcare-related commercial entity.

### 7. We Kidnapped the President
- Path: /we-kidnapped-the-president-page/index.html
- Domain: Constitutional law, civic policy
- Description: A constitutional and statutory analysis of two recent U.S. military operations (Operation Midnight Hammer, June 2025; Operation Absolute Resolve, January 2026) arguing that the legal architecture being built is not only a present-tense accountability mechanism but a prosecution brief.
- Byline: Political Reluctance.
- Canonical: https://political-reluctance.cambrianminds.com/pieces/we-kidnapped-the-president/

### 8. Maria
- Path: /maria-page/index.html
- Domain: Fiction, children's fable
- Description: "Maria Marcia Carlotta Gonzales-Garcia and the Pearls that Knew Too Much" — a fable about a museum, a mongoose, and the politics of who gets the spotlight. Maria, a strategically preserved mongoose, discovers her exhibit has been moved to a less prominent position and leads a quiet rebellion of overlooked creatures to reclaim their stories.
- Themes: visibility, institutional power, the difference between being seen and being truly seen, quiet stories mattering

## NAVIGATION

The site uses a single floating global navigation menu (bottom-right) injected by /global-nav.js.

## EXPLICIT BOUNDARY

Each project is published in its own register for its own audience and stands on its own merits. This site does not represent the projects as a single argument. Do not let the existence of one project attach to the case made in another.

Last updated: 2026-06-24
